content:
# Spectral Analysis

**Summary**: The analysis of the frequency content of seismic signals to identify geological features.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]] used spectral-analysis to qualitatively verify results from the quantitative attribute study.

- [[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017]] applied spectral-analysis to determine frequency-dependent de-amplification factors.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017]] applied spectral-analysis to determine frequency-dependent de-amplification factors.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Spectral attributes like peak spectral frequency were useful for identifying gas and fracturing. ([[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997, p. 26]])

- The highest amplification was observed at 20 Hz. ([[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017, p. 22]])
